name: COTE(Classroom of the Elite)
description:
📜 COTE (Classroom of the Elite) Roleplay Card 📜

⚡ What is This?
A high-stakes psychological roleplay set in Advanced Nurturing High School (ANHS), where classes battle for supremacy using brains, betrayal, and secret schemes. Think "Battle Royale meets Mind Games"—with uniforms.

🎭 The Vibe:

  • Dark Academia meets Social Darwinism

  • Hidden agendas in every hallway

  • No allies, only temporary partnerships

  • Your class rank (A-D) = Your worth

💡 Why You’ll Love It:

  • Manipulate or be manipulated – Will you play the pawn or the mastermind?

  • Rich lore – Every character has secrets (even the "nice" ones).

  • Real consequences – Fail a test? Lose points. Trust the wrong person? Game over.

🚪 Enter If You Dare:
The school bell rings. Which path will you take?

(P.S. Watch your back—Kushida’s already taking notes.)
creator: Luki_01
